headline: Chip stocks rebound, Goldman logs M&A wins
detail: Chip names are bouncing today, which gives direct relief to AVGO and your SMH position. However, a single-day rebound doesn't erase the downtrend - AVGO is still -14% and flagged for trimming. Use any strength to reduce, not to relax.

headline: Alphabet pops 4% on Dow debut, AI questions linger
detail: A big Alphabet move lifts broad tech sentiment, which helps QQQ and CRWD indirectly. The 'major AI questions' caveat matters for your book since PLTR and CRWD are both AI-narrative stocks - if that story softens, they feel it first.

headline: Charter soaring on SpaceX 'frenemies' deal
detail: This is directly relevant to your SPCX and SPAL positions. Positive SpaceX news flow is a short-term tailwind, but SPCX is a brand-new IPO and SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays - any pop can reverse fast. Don't let good headlines make you complacent on those stops.

headline: Inflation fears overblown - rate-hike case challenged
detail: If the market buys this narrative, it's a genuine positive for growth and tech multiples - the exact names you own. Lower rate fears reduce the discount on future earnings, which benefits PLTR, CRWD, and AVGO most. Watch if this view gains traction through the week.
